report_md:
# Step 6 · K 拍 · 学习 + 决策账 + 停止 [PASS]
场景: apt_5host · 入口: attack:idx_stress:evt_015
根因 GT: (未指定) · T1021.002
时间窗对齐: alert_ts=1781321714

## ① 做了什么
_k_phase: graph.add_events -> ledger.update -> beta.update -> calib.record -> should_stop()

## ② 输入
- confirmed 4 (valid 4)
- chosen 3 探针
  - process_tree · ta0002 @ WS-USER-01 (voi=-0.049869)
  - auth_log · initial-access @ WS-USER-01 (voi=-0.049869)
  - persistence_scan · persistence @ WS-USER-01 (voi=-0.049869)

## ③ 产出

- ledger margin: 0.1580 -> 0.0204
- beta keys: 0 -> 3

  - auth_log: hit=True beta(2.0,1.0) obs=1

- stop: should_stop=False reason=continue

- [OK] k_calib_recorded: GenCalibration.record 按 probe.source 写入
